_comment: Host-agent registry for the groundwork CLI (bin/groundwork.js). CLI-internal data — read at install time to drive detect/wire/prompt/parseInitFlags; NOT seeded into user projects. Single-canon invariant: hosts either symlink to AGENTS.md/.agents/ or read them natively — no body-template or copy semantics live here. Keep status values in sync with the Support matrix in docs/host-support.md (verified | wired-untested | manual).

hosts.label: Claude Code
hosts.notes: Reference host — the simulation harness runs real Claude Code sessions against the installed skills. Gets symlinks to the canonical AGENTS.md + .agents/.

hosts.label: Cursor
hosts.notes: Reads AGENTS.md + .agents/skills/ natively. Wired by name at install; no verified end-to-end run yet.
